-module(solution).
-export([solve/2]).

solve(nums, K) ->
    Sorted = lists:sort(nums),
    N = length(Sorted),
    MaxSize = 1,
    lists:foldl(

            Res = binary_search(Sorted, Left, Target),
            CurrentSize = Res - Left + 1,
            NewMax = max(Acc, CurrentSize),
            NewMax
        end,
        MaxSize,
        lists:seq(0, N - 1)
    ),
    N - MaxSize.

binary_search(Sorted, Left, Target) ->
    Low = Left,
    High = length(Sorted) - 1,
    Res = Left - 1,
    binary_search(Sorted, Low, High, Res, Target).

binary_search(Sorted, Low, High, Res, Target) ->
    case Low > High of

                    binary_search(Sorted, NewLow, High, NewRes, Target);
                true ->
                    NewHigh = Mid - 1,

    end.

function solve(nums, k) {

    nums.sort((a, b) => a - b);

    let max_size = 1;

    for (let left = 0; left < nums.length; left++) {

        let target = nums[left] * k;

        let low = left;

        let high = nums.length -1;

        let res = left -1; // initially, no element found.

        while (low <= high) {

            if (nums[mid] <= target) {

                low = mid + 1;

            } else {

                high = mid -1;

            }

        }

        let current_size = res - left + 1;

        if (current_size > max_size) {

            max_size = current_size;

        }

    }

    return nums.length - max_size;

}
